source_intake_record.raw_question_text: 如图所示，$S_{1}$ 和 $S_{2}$ 是两个相干光源，它们到 $P$ 点的距离分别为 $r_{1}$ 和 $r_{2}$。路径 $S_{1} P$ 垂直穿过一块厚度为 $t_{1}$，折射率为 $n_{1}$ 的介质板，路径 $S_{2} P$ 垂直穿过厚度为 $t_{2}$，折射率为 $n_{2}$ 的另一介质板，其余部分可看作真空。这两条路径的光程差是多少？
extraction_notes: images 字段提供的是 PIL 图像对象字符串表示，不是实际文件路径或 URL

issues: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL image object string representation instead of an actual file path or URL

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says "如图所示" and names diagram entities S1, S2, P
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false in the sample fields
the text also states the key geometric/physical relations (r1, r2, vertical passage through slabs), so image dependence is high but not maximal
multi_step: solving requires forming each path's optical path length separately, including vacuum distance plus slab correction
the final answer is a difference of two composite expressions, indicating at least two-step combination/subtraction
no choices are provided and the task is still a single direct physics derivation rather than a long chain
verifiability: answer_type is short_text and the provided answer is a precise symbolic formula
the target quantity is well-defined as optical path difference, so a rule-based or symbolic equivalence check is plausible
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true and answer_present=true support reliable downstream checking

risk_flags: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL image object string representation instead of an actual file path or URL
symbolic equivalence may be needed because mathematically equivalent optical-path-difference expressions can differ by algebraic form or sign convention

decision_reasons: 题干、答案与主图像资产均存在，核心语义支撑完整
综合打分较高，尤其是 verifiability_score=0.89，适合进入候选池
虽存在 metadata.image_paths 记录异常，但 image_manifest 中已有可用实际图像文件，未构成核心资产缺失
题目对图像有较高依赖，但题干同时给出了关键物理关系，答案也是可校验的精确符号表达式
